generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.com/dtdf#
prefix base: http://example.com/base#
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance CraneStateTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane state variables stored in TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, AnemometerDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]
instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]
instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]
instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement"
]
instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]
instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying digital twin components",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, HistoricalDataLogging, RealTimeDataVisualization, SimulationService, ContinuousValidation, FaultDetection
]
instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane state data",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]
instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time data monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualization
]
instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for inter-service communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, HistoricalDataLogging, RealTimeDataVisualization, SimulationService, ContinuousValidation, FaultDetection
]
instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for crane control and trajectory generation",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, SimulationService, ContinuousValidation, FaultDetection
]
instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor data acquisition",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]
instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for crane design",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]
instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture modeling tool for system design",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]
instance OptimalTrajectoryGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal crane trajectories using kinematic model",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlan
]
instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs and stores historical crane state data in TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageAction
]
instance RealTimeDataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes trajectory traces and confidence bounds in Grafana dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryTraceVisualization
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane movements for validation and planning",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]
instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validates real-time measurements against simulation models and triggers alerts for threshold breaches",
    DTDFVocab:provides ThresholdBreachedAlert
]
instance FaultDetection : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults using time series classification techniques",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalization
]
instance DataStorageAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Storage of historical crane data in TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance TrajectoryPlan : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal path for crane movement generated by trajectory generation service",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ThresholdBreachedAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert triggered when sensor measurements exceed predefined thresholds during continuous validation"
]
instance FaultLocalization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies specific fault locations in crane system using time series classification techniques"
]
instance TrajectoryTraceVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of trajectory traces and confidence bounds in Grafana dashboard"
]
instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated crane movement results used for validation"
]
instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system composed of interconnected containers for lab-scale gantry crane",
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, CADModel, KinematicModel, CraneStateTimeSeriesData, TimescaleDB, Grafana, PythonGantrylib, EclipseMosquitto, Docker, Arduino, AutodeskFusion360, C4Model, OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, HistoricalDataLogging, RealTimeDataVisualization, SimulationService, ContinuousValidation, FaultDetection, DataStorageAction, TrajectoryPlan, ThresholdBreachedAlert, FaultLocalization, TrajectoryTraceVisualization, SimulationResultInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., optimal trajectories from Trajectory Generator Service) sent via Control Application to physical crane's motor controllers for movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with no specified time intervals; data logged and validated continuously during operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane components (frame, motors, controllers, sensors) interfaced via Python; digital twin services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation) interconnected via MQTT and TimescaleDB; operator and researcher interact through Human Machine Interface."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') with continuous validation and fault detection during crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between real measurements and simulated trajectories; thresholds trigger operator notifications; model validation techniques reused from [5]."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; TimescaleDB for time-series data storage; Python-based interfaces for physical control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized components (database, MQTT broker, dashboard) deployed on a personal computer via docker-compose; gantrylib Python module installed via pip."
]
